/DAWT/COLT/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE (HD BAKER PLACES) AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO; SUBMIT TO DRUG TESTING AS DIRECTED; ATTEND COUNSELING AND GROUPS /CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEESIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/
